final_prompt.prompt:
Create a comprehensive UI design system for web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a "经典简约科技风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple Vision Pro spatial interface design, Dieter Rams Braun product design philosophy, Tesla UI minimalism; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple UI components across device contexts — web Dashboard layout, mobile interface screens, card components, button variants, and control elements
Subject: must include all UI components: web Dashboard (data visualization panels), mobile interface screens, card components, button variants, input controls
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a futuristic tech atmosphere with depth and dimensionality — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a cool tech-forward palette with strong contrast and depth layers — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: needs sleek glass-morphism, subtle gradients, and refined surface treatments — exact material execution is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the "视觉炫酷、层次丰富、科技感极强" direction across all components
Avoid:
